landing.heroSubtitle: Mock uses adaptive AI to conduct realistic voice interviews tailored to your tech stack and target level — then gives you honest, structured feedback to improve.
landing.feat1Desc: The AI interviewer speaks — you answer by voice. It feels like a real interview, not a quiz app.
landing.feat2Desc: Pick your target seniority. The AI calibrates question difficulty to you and adjusts as you go.
landing.feat3Desc: After every session, get a detailed report: strengths, gaps, a score, and 3–5 concrete next steps.
landing.stat2Label: Speak your answers, like a real interview
landing.stat3Label: To a full, structured feedback report
landing.stepsSubtitle: From sign-up to a scored report in three steps.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready to go unlimited.
landing.finalTitle: Ready to ace your next interview?
landing.finalSubtitle: Practice smarter, not harder. Your first interview is on us.
landing.footer: Mock. Built for developers who want to get better.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Start a new interview or review past sessions.
dashboard.heroLead: Your next interview is the one that lands the offer. Practice with adaptive AI, get honest feedback, and walk in prepared.
dashboard.noInterviewsDesc: A realistic, voice-based interview tailored to your stack and target level — with an honest, structured score report at the end.
dashboard.emptyBullet1: Talk through real questions out loud

newInterview.title: New interview
newInterview.subtitle: Choose a target level and the tech you want to be interviewed on.
newInterview.limitReached: You've used all {{limit}} interviews on the {{plan}} plan this month. Upgrade to keep practicing.
newInterview.questionCountHint: The interviewer may probe a topic with follow-ups before moving on, just like a real interview.
newInterview.maxStacksError: Your {{plan}} plan allows up to {{max}} tech stack(s) per interview.
newInterview.pickOneError: Pick at least one tech stack.
newInterview.interviewerHint: Each voice is a different interviewer. Pick who you'll talk to.
newInterview.noVoices: No voices detected in this browser — a default system voice will be used.

personas.alex: Warm and encouraging — puts you at ease.
personas.sam: Pragmatic and direct — straight to the point.
personas.maya: Curious and friendly — loves a good follow-up.
personas.nina: Calm and methodical — gives you room to think.
personas.leo: Energetic and fast-paced — keeps things moving.
personas.priya: Thoughtful and supportive — digs into your reasoning.
personas.omar: Structured and thorough — covers all the bases.

session.title: {{level}} interview
session.question: Question {{number}}
session.introRecord: The AI interviewer will ask you questions out loud. Answer by voice or by typing. This session will be recorded so you can review it afterwards.
session.introNoRecord: The AI interviewer will ask you questions out loud. Answer by voice or by typing. Session recording is available on Pro and Premium plans.
session.answerPlaceholder: Speak using the mic button, or type your answer here…
session.wrappingUpDesc: Saving your recording and generating your feedback report.
session.micDenied: Microphone access was denied — the session will run without a recording.
session.dictationUnsupported: Voice dictation is not supported in this browser — type your answer instead.
session.dictationNetworkError: Voice dictation couldn't reach the speech service. Use Google Chrome (other Chromium browsers lack the speech backend) and check your connection, or type your answer instead.
session.autoSendHint: Send my answer automatically when I stop talking
session.manualSendHint: Review and send each answer yourself

recordings.title: Recordings
recordings.subtitle: Listen back to your past interview sessions.
recordings.empty: No recordings yet. Recorded sessions from your Pro or Premium interviews show up here.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.payDescription: Enter your card details to upgrade. You can cancel anytime.
subscription.securedByStripe: Payments are securely processed by Stripe.
subscription.paymentSuccess: Payment successful — you're now on the {{plan}} plan!
subscription.paymentError: Payment could not be completed. Please try again.
subscription.testCardNote: Stripe test mode: pay with card 4242 4242 4242 4242, any future expiry, any CVC and ZIP.

PRO.name: Pro
features: Up to 3 tech stacks per interview
